3239720.name: Rift Riders
3239720.description:
Overview:
In Rift Riders, players are thrust into a fast-paced, maze-like environment, tasked with escaping within a strict 5-minute time limit.

Objective: The objective is to collect artifacts scattered across the maze, which allow players to hop between multiple dimensions to find the way out.

Challenges:
Monstrous Foes (PvE), Player Competition (PvP), Time Pressure, Fast Pace, Visual, Environmental Visual distortion, and optical illusion.

Progression: Artifact Collection for switching between dimensions, Dimension Exploration, Power-ups & Gear.

Endgame Race: As time dwindles, players who successfully uncover the dimension with the exit gate must rush to escape, leading to tense final moments, combat, and chaos as others scramble to follow or sabotage the leader.
